text: Would you trade lives with a C-list celebrity (constant struggle for relevance, small income) for 5 years for $500,000?
Would you date your most hated celebrity for 1 year (must seem genuine in public) for $1 million?
Would you become instantly famous but can never use social media, streaming, or the internet again for $2 million?
Would you be Kanye West's personal assistant for 2 years (deal with all his chaos) for $400,000?
Would you star in a reality show that exposes your worst habits and secrets for $750,000?
Would you have paparazzi follow you 24/7 for 2 years (including bathroom, bedroom, etc.) for $1.5 million?
Would you have a one-hit wonder worse than 'Friday' by Rebecca Black that defines your entire life for $200,000?
Would you be as famous as Amber Heard during her trial (everyone hates you, career destroyed) for $5 million?
Would you live in a mansion with 24/7 livestream cameras in every room (including bathrooms) for $10 million annually?
Would you be in a fake PR marriage (must live together, seem in love) with a celebrity you find unattractive for 3 years for $2 million?
Would you host a late-night show but every joke bombs and you get roasted online daily for $3 million over 2 years?
Would you become a viral meme like 'Hide the Pain Harold' (your face = universal joke forever) for $250,000?
Would you attend red carpet events weekly for a year but trip and fall on camera at least once per month for $75,000?
Would you have a manufactured feud with Beyoncé's fanbase (they'll destroy you online) for $1 million?
Would you be a Donald Trump impersonator full-time (at rallies, events, people think you support him) for $300,000 annually?
Would you have 100 million bot followers but everyone knows they're fake for $300,000?
Would you win an Oscar for playing a Nazi sympathizer (people think you believe it) for $1 million?
Would you be Tom Cruise's stunt double and do all his dangerous stunts (broken bones guaranteed) for $500,000?
Would you have a wax figure at Madame Tussauds but it's intentionally ugly and mocked online for $25,000?
Would you be Simon Cowell on America's Got Talent (must crush people's dreams on camera) for $1 million per season?
Would you have a Will Smith/Chris Rock level scandal (everyone picks sides, you're the villain) for $3 million?
Would you ghostwrite a celebrity's bestselling memoir (they take all credit, you sign NDA forever) for $300,000?
Would you attend every major award show for a year but always lose when nominated (cameras on your disappointed face) for $150,000?
Would you be famous as the person who tripped and fell at the Oscars on live TV (replayed forever) for $400,000?
Which celebrity would you live with for 1 year (share bedroom, bathroom, everything) for $500,000? Name them.
Would you be a spokesperson for a pyramid scheme/MLM (people lose money because of you) for $1 million?
Would you have your messy, dirty home (worst state) featured on MTV Cribs for $100,000?
Would you stage a Kim Kardashian-style sex tape leak (everyone you know will see it) for $2 million?
Would you launch a perfume that everyone says smells like garbage for $500,000?
Would you be Travis Kelce's plus-one to all Taylor Swift events for a year (Swifties attack you online) for $600,000?
Would you have an unauthorized tell-all biography exposing your darkest secrets published for $800,000?
Would you be Jackie Chan's stunt double (expect multiple injuries, possible permanent damage) for $750,000 annually?
Would you get a Hollywood Walk of Fame star but it's constantly vandalized and you must pay for repairs for $400,000?
Would you get cancelled like James Charles (lose everything, mass hate, career over) for $500,000?
Would you have a Comedy Central Roast where comedians destroy you with brutal truths (no filters) for $350,000?
Would you be Lizzo's backup dancer on tour for 6 months (intense workouts, grueling schedule) for $150,000?
Would you have paparazzi sell your unflattering photos (worst angles, no makeup, crying) weekly for $750,000 annually?
Would you voice a character in a children's movie that becomes a cringe TikTok sound (mocked for years) for $200,000?
Would you publish an autobiography full of lies (everyone believes them, damages relationships) for $1.5 million?
Which celebrity would you train as their personal trainer (4am wakeups, their mood swings, demanding) for $400,000? Name them.
Would you have your private DMs with your ex leaked to the public (everyone reads your intimate conversations) for $300,000?
Would you be the person twerking in the background of Miley Cyrus's 'Wrecking Ball' video for $10,000?
Would you have a Netflix documentary exposing your failures and lowest moments (narrated by your worst enemy) for $600,000?
Would you be a Kim Jong Un lookalike and attend events as him (people think you support him) for $100,000 per event?
Would you have a year-long feud with Elon Musk (he tweets about you daily to millions) for $1 million?
Would you do a Super Bowl commercial for erectile dysfunction (your face/name = ED forever) for $800,000?
Would you live in a 'haunted' mansion with fake paranormal events staged for reality TV for $600,000?
Would you be Gordon Ramsay's taste tester and get yelled at daily on camera for $300,000?
Would you have a reality show that gets cancelled after 2 episodes (you're the most hated failure) for $400,000?
Which celebrity would you manage their Twitter/X account for (you get blamed for their controversial tweets) for $500,000? Name them.
